name: Lotus Chicken Loaf Grain-Free Canned Dog Food
description: Give your pal the delicious, single-protein nutrition he needs with the Lotus Chicken Loaf Grain-Free Canned Dog Food. This grain-free loaf is made with real chicken as the first ingredient with sweet potatoes, asparagus, blueberries, pumpkin and cranberries. Enhanced with essential vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, it provides a complete and balanced diet for dogs of all ages. It also has superfoods like New Zealand green mussel, flaxseeds, and salmon oil and coconut oils for a healthy skin and coat. Since it’s formulated with a single protein source and no carrageenan, guar gum or xanthan gum, it’s great for pups with sensitive tummies. Plus, it’s made in California, USA, with no grains, wheat, corn, soy, or anything artificial.
